message:
chore(beads): re-close already-shipped beads after JSONL force-import reset

Re-closed 11 beads (z1nkz parent + 2 children, 0aczd parent + 3 children,
and the entire 24llg.4 bootstrap epic with 5 sub-beads) that had landed
work in commits between 2026-04-18 and 2026-04-19 but were reset to open
by the recent JSONL force-import. Verified each bead's commit artifacts
remain present in tree before closing.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
